content.problemStatement:
In this task, you are required to create a simple introduction that includes your name, favorite hobby, and the reason you enjoy it—all separated by " | " for clarity. You will practice using f-strings to format your output neatly.

You should format your output as follows:
content.outputFormat: Print exactly: Name: John | Hobby: Painting | Reason: It allows me to express creativity.

sampleTestCases.output: Name: John | Hobby: Painting | Reason: It allows me to express creativity.
sampleTestCases.explanation: The program has no input; it directly prints the required introduction.

hidden.label: minimum boundary
hidden.expectedOutput: Name: John | Hobby: Painting | Reason: It allows me to express creativity.

hidden.label: maximum boundary
hidden.expectedOutput: Name: John | Hobby: Painting | Reason: It allows me to express creativity.

hidden.label: edge case
hidden.expectedOutput: Name: John | Hobby: Painting | Reason: It allows me to express creativity.

hidden.label: general case 1
hidden.expectedOutput: Name: John | Hobby: Painting | Reason: It allows me to express creativity.

hidden.label: general case 2
hidden.expectedOutput: Name: John | Hobby: Painting | Reason: It allows me to express creativity.

solution.approach: The task does not require any computation. The program simply prints the required sentence. No input is read, and no algorithmic steps are needed.
solution.timeComplexity: O(1) – constant time to output a fixed string.
solution.spaceComplexity: O(1) – only a few constant‑size variables are used.

code.JavaScript:
const output = "Name: John | Hobby: Painting | Reason: It allows me to express creativity.";
console.log(output);
